claim_bullets.bullet_text: Imps use paralyzing poison in their tail. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.178-180)
Imps have a sharp tail tip like a spear. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.178-180)
Anyone who suffers damage from an imp must attempt resistance roll. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.178-180)

source_record_text: This section describes various youma creatures found in the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, including imps, kobolds, gremlins, hobgoblins, goblins, goblin shamans, goblin lords, marshmen, and dark elves.
